title: Rust API idiomaticity: post-review cleanup
description: Seven idiom gaps identified in a Rust-bigot review of the jmap-chat crate API. Covers: named struct for Invocation, DRY fix for EndpointType, base_url validation, capability list correctness in build_request, Send bound on subscribe_events stream, Cow pattern for resolve_client_id, and rename of auth_failed_if.
